description_long: This is a modern, rectangular storage cabinet or shelf unit with a modular design, featuring six compartments arranged in two rows of three. The structure is framed with metallic or metallic-finished edges, and the panels are a dark, likely black or deep gray color, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. Each of the three lower compartments has a visible circular knob, suggesting that these sections are doors or drawers, while the upper compartments are open for easy access. The unit stands on small, round feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. The back and sides are solid, matching the color and finish of the front panels. This piece is suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas, providing both open and closed storage options.
description: A sleek, modern cabinet or shelf unit with six compartments, three of which have doors with circular knobs and three open shelves, framed in metallic edges and finished in black.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open upper shelves and three lower compartments with circular knobs, framed by metallic edges.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile and the depth of the compartments, with metallic framing visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, flat back panel with no openings or knobs, matching the dark finish of the rest of the unit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing the slim profile and metallic frame.
